title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell presents data on the rapid shift in software engineering toward AI-driven and autonomous agent development. He reports that Cursor is seeing 30% of PRs fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code jumped from 15% to 75% in a year, and autonomous agents are increasingly taking on end-to-end development tasks.
